hero.title: Complete digital solutions,
hero.subtitle: Every business is unique. We build the solution that fits your needs exactly.

data_bi.title: Data & Business Intelligence
data_bi.tagline: Your data has answers. We help you ask the right questions.
data_bi.description: Transform your raw data into actionable insights. We design complete Business Intelligence solutions, from collection to visualization.
features: Interactive dashboard creation (Power BI, GCP Looker)
Real-time reporting and KPI monitoring solutions
data_bi.result: A client reduced their reporting time by 60% thanks to our automated dashboards.

dev.title: Software & Web Development
dev.description: Custom, robust and scalable applications. From architecture to deployment, we build solutions that meet your exact needs.
dev.result: Development of a complete SaaS platform with integrated leasing model.

analytics.title: Analytics & Digital Marketing
analytics.tagline: Every click tells a story. We help you read it.
analytics.description: Measure, optimize and perform. Our data-driven approach to digital marketing enables informed decisions and improved ROI.
analytics.result: +35% organic traffic in 6 months with a data-driven SEO strategy.

automation.title: Process Automation
automation.tagline: What's repetitive should be automated. Period.
automation.description: Eliminate manual tasks and gain efficiency. We design automated pipelines that process your data reliably and at scale.
features: Advanced SQL scripts to automate data processing
Flow automation with Dataflow and Cloud Scheduler
Quality testing and automated processing monitoring
automation.result: Complete automation of a data pipeline reducing 20h of manual work to 0.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.tagline: AI is not the future. It's now. And we'll take you there.
ai.description: Integrate artificial intelligence into your business. From predictive models to chatbots, we develop AI solutions tailored to your needs.
features: Machine learning solutions tailored to client needs
ai.result: Deployment of an AI chatbot handling 70% of level 1 support requests.
